session.assistant:
Perfect! The systematic method rename is complete. Let me create a comprehensive summary of what was accomplished:
## Summary: Systematic Method Renames Complete
I successfully performed systematic method renames across the entire erk codebase for the `ManagedPrBackend` ABC and its `GitHubManagedPrBackend` implementation using sed-based refactoring (simpler and more reliable than LibCST for this straightforward rename task).
### Methods Renamed (9 total)
| Old Method | New Method | |-----------|-----------| | `get_plan` | `get_managed_pr` | | `list_plans` | `list_managed_prs` | | `create_plan` | `create_managed_pr` | | `close_plan` | `close_managed_pr` | | `update_plan_content` | `update_managed_pr_content` | | `update_plan_title` | `update_managed_pr_title` | | `get_plan_for_branch` | `get_managed_pr_for_branch` | | `resolve_plan_id_for_branch` | `resolve_pr_number_for_branch` | | `find_sessions_for_plan` | `find_sessions_for_managed_pr` |
### Scope of Changes
- **95 files modified** across `src/`, `packages/`, and `tests/` - **583 insertions, 582 deletions** (net +1 line due to docstring updates) - All changes are purely renames - no logic modifications
### Key Files Modified
**Core Definitions:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/backend.py` - ABC method definitions - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py` - Implementation methods
**Sample Usage Files:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/plan_store/test_plan_backend_interface.py` - 91 other files with call sites
### Verification
✓ **Python syntax check passed** on core files ✓ **0 occurrences** of old method names (`.get_plan(`, `.list_plans(`, etc.) ✓ **30+ call sites** of new `.get_managed_pr(` method ✓ **38+ call sites** of new `.create_managed_pr(` method ✓ **6+ call sites** of new `.list_managed_prs(` method ✓ **All docstrings** updated to reference new method names ✓ **All method definitions** renamed in both ABC and implementation
### Methods Preserved (Not Renamed)
As requested, these methods were left unchanged: - `ensure_plan_header` - `get_provider_name` - `get_metadata_field` - `get_all_metadata_fields` - `get_comments` - `update_metadata` - `add_comment` - `add_label` - `post_event` - `_convert_to_plan` (private helper)
The refactoring is complete and ready for review. All method calls have been systematically renamed across the codebase while preserving all logic and behavior.
